item.title: Pwnyracing: Chall01
item.description: Hello everyone, I hope that you’re well. Last time, I found on twitter an interesting set of challenges made by 0xb0bb. After taking a look on it, I saw directly that I could learn new things with this, so I decided to do a writeup for some of them. You can find the challenges here. I’m going to try the first one. Let’s start. First look We’re going to do the things like a real ctf challenges, all we need is on dist directory.

item.title: Theme usage
item.description: I’m goint to show you here how to configure my hugo theme. You can find the theme here. To use it, you need to make some basics configurations. Let’s go. Config file We’re going to configure the config file first. This file is at on the root directory of your site and named config.toml. Copy the configuration file below and make change based on the comment and you desires. baseURL = "https://testmara.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Hi everyone, and welcome to my blog. I’m for now a network and telecom student with a hobby for cybersecurity in general and pwn in particular, and I thought a blog would be a good way to share my knowledge and share writeups for some CTF challenges. I am not saying that I am an expert on the topic, but I will do my best to make a good and usable contents.
